snap.name: Nutrition Assistance (SNAP)
snap.description: Helps low-income families buy nutritious food from local stores.
snap.how_to_apply: Apply online using Health-e-Arizona Plus. You will need proof of income and identity.

ahcccs.name: Medicaid (AHCCCS)
ahcccs.description: Provides free or low-cost health insurance for adults and children.
ahcccs.how_to_apply: Apply online using Health-e-Arizona Plus. It is the same application for SNAP and AHCCCS.

liheap.name: Utility Bill Assistance (LIHEAP)
liheap.description: Helps pay home energy bills, including electricity and gas.
liheap.how_to_apply: Apply online through the DES A-to-Z Connect portal or contact your local Community Action Agency.

eitc.name: Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC)
eitc.description: A federal tax credit for workers with low-to-moderate incomes, which can result in a large tax refund.
eitc.how_to_apply: You must file a federal tax return (Form 1040) to claim this credit. Use IRS Free File to file for free.
